name: song-trivia-server
description: Server-authoritative multiplayer music guessing game (single room).

comments.optionalScaleDeps: These are loaded lazily ONLY when the matching env var is set (see DEPLOY.md). Install them on the host to enable: '@socket.io/redis-adapter' + 'ioredis' (REDIS_URL, multi-instance), 'pg' (DATABASE_URL, persistent leaderboard), '@sentry/node' (SENTRY_DSN, error monitoring).
